step_rationale: Mitochondrial respiratory-chain component; dysfunction drives ischemic cardiomyocyte injury and ATP depletion.
mechanism: NDUFA8 mutations or dysregulation impair mitochondrial energy production, exacerbating cardiomyocyte ischemic injury during acute MI.

references.title: Transcriptomic and single-cell insights into mitochondrial genes NDUFA8, ECI2, and ACADM in acute myocardial infarction.
